bidding.note: 1D-1S-2C-2H FSF by S, opener shows 3H raise; clean FSF but a long Blackwood tail to 6C buries the point a bit
1D-1S-2C-2H FSF by S, opener shows extra D, S rebids S, settle 3N; FSF principle on clear display
1C-1H-1S-2D FSF by S (D is 4th suit), opener 3C, 3H, settle 3N; clean canonical FSF
1C-1H-2D(reverse)-2S FSF by S (S is 4th suit), then 3H and Blackwood to 6H; FSF clean but slam tail buries it
1H-1S-2D-3C jump 4th suit FSF by S, opener settles 3N; clean but the jump-to-3C 4th suit is a minor wrinkle
1D-1H-1S-2C FSF by S (C is 4th), then 3C-4D-Blackwood-6D; clean FSF start, long slam tail
1C-1H-1S-2D FSF by S, 3C-3H then Blackwood stalls at 5H; FSF clean but slam tail buries the point
1D-1H-1S-2C FSF then jump 4H; with a 7-card H suit S could jump-rebid H naturally rather than route through FSF
1D-1H-2C-2S FSF by S (S is 4th), 2N-4D then Blackwood to 6D; clean FSF, long slam tail
1D-1H-1S-2C FSF by S, opener 2D-2H, settle 3N; clean descriptive FSF exploration
1D-1H-1S-2C FSF by S, opener 3C, settle 3N; clean canonical FSF
1C-1H-2D-2S FSF then 3N raised straight to 6N; indefensible overbid to a failing slam (DD down_both) buries the teaching point
1D-1H-2C-2S FSF by S (S is 4th), 3H then Blackwood to 6H; clean FSF, long slam tail
1C-1H-1S-2D FSF by S, 3C-3H, settle 4H in the H fit; clean canonical FSF to a major game
1C-1H-1S-2D FSF by S, 3C-3H, settle 3N; clean canonical FSF
1H-1S-2C-2D FSF by S (D is 4th), 2N-3S, settle 3N; clean canonical FSF
1D-1S-2C-2H FSF by S (H is 4th), opener 3D, S jumps 4H to game; clean FSF with a fast game jump
1C-1H-1S-2D FSF by S, 3C-3H, settle 3N; clean canonical FSF
1D-1H-1S-2C FSF by S, opener jumps 3H showing extras+3H, settle 4H; clean canonical FSF to a major game
1H-1S-2D-3C jump FSF by S, E doubles, opener 3N; clean FSF with a competitive double wrinkle
1C-1H-1S-2D FSF by S, 3C-3H, settle 3N; clean canonical FSF
1H-1S-2C-2D FSF by S (D is 4th), 2N-3S, settle 3N; clean canonical FSF
1C-1H-2D-2S FSF by S (S is 4th), then a very long cuebid/Blackwood tail to 6C deeply buries the FSF point
1D-1H-2C-2S FSF by S (S is 4th), 2N-3N; clean canonical FSF
1H-1S-2D-3C jump FSF by S, opener shows 3S, settle 4S in the 5-3; clean FSF with a jump 4th suit
1D-1S-2C-2H FSF by S (H is 4th), opener 3D-3S, settle 3N; clean canonical FSF
1D-1S-2C-2H FSF by S (H is 4th), opener 3H-3S, settle 3N; clean canonical FSF
1D-1S-2C-2H FSF by S (H is 4th), opener 3D, S 4H, opener corrects 4S; clean FSF with a minor final-contract wrinkle
1C-1H-1S-2D: S bids the 4th suit (D) artificially holding 5-5 H+C; opener shows extra C, 3N. Clean.
1C-2D-2H-2S: S's 2S is the unbid 4th suit (GF), opener bids 3D, 3N. Sound, though FSF starts from a 2/1.
1D-1H-1S-2C: clean 4th-suit C, but a long clarifying string (2D-2H-3D) wanders before 3N.
1C-1H-1S-2D 4th suit; opener shows delayed H support, cue-bid tail (4C-4D) to 4H buries the point a bit.
1D-1H-1S-2C FSF is fine, but a runaway Blackwood string (4N-5D-5S-5N) reaches a 6H that fails on DD; obscures the point.
1C-1H-1S-2D: S bids 4th suit D, opener 3C-3H, settle 3N. Clean first-exposure FSF.
1D-1H-1S-2C 4th suit; opener jump-shows H support, raise to 4H. Sound; 4H fails on DD (play, not bidding).
S holds 7 hearts; 2C 4th-suit is a poor choice over a natural H bid, and the Blackwood 6H fails on DD. Muddy as an FSF model.
1H-1S-2C-2D: S bids 4th suit D, opener supports S, Blackwood tail stops in 5S. FSF clear; minor slam-try wrinkle.
1D-1H-2C-2S: S's 2S is the unbid 4th suit (GF); opener 2N-3H, settle 3N. Clean.
1H-1S-2D-3C: S bids the 4th suit C (GF) asking; opener bids 3N. Clean.
1D-1H-1S-2C FSF is fine, but a runaway grand-slam Blackwood string lands in 7H that fails on DD; teaching point lost.
1D-1H-1S-2C: S bids 4th suit C, opener 3C, settle 3N. Clean and short.
1D-1S-2H-3C 4th suit is OK, but opener's leap 3N->6N is a wild guess that fails on DD and is wrong-sided; obscures FSF.
1D-1S-2C-2H: S bids 4th suit H (GF); 2N-3S then 4D cue to 4S. FSF clear; small cue-bid wrinkle.
1D-1H-1S-2C 4th suit; opener shows H, then a short cue string (3S-4C) to 4H. FSF clear.
1D-1S-2H-3C 4th suit OK, but a long slam string (3N-4D-4H-5C) reaches 6D that fails on DD; buries the point.
1C-1H-1S-2D 4th suit; opener jump-shows H support, raise to 4H. Clean and short.
1D-1S-2C-2H: S bids 4th suit H (GF); 3H-3S, settle 3N. Clean.
1D-1S-2C-2H: S bids 4th suit H, opener 2N, settle 3N. Clean and short.
1C-1H-2D-2S: S's 2S is the unbid 4th suit (GF); opener 2N-3H, settle 3N. Clean.
1C-2D-2H-2S 4th suit is clear, but the auction wanders 3S-3N-4D and stops in an odd 4N with S holding 7 solid D.
1D-1H-1S-2C 4th suit; opener shows H, S jumps to 4H. Clean and short.
1H-1S-2D-3C: S bids the 4th suit C (GF) asking; opener bids 3N. Clean.
1D-1S-2C-2H: S bids 4th suit H (GF); 2N-3S, settle 3N. Clean.
1C-1H-1S-2D 4th suit; opener jump-shows H support, raise to 4H. Clean and short.
1D-1H-1S-2C FSF is clear, but the auction wanders extensively (3D-3N-4H-4S-5H) before settling in 5S.
1D-1S-2C-2H: S bids 4th suit H (GF); E doubles, opener bids 3N. FSF clear with a competitive wrinkle.
S bids 2D FSF but holds AKQ9862, a self-sufficient suit; a direct game-force jump in S is arguable, FSF over-engineers it.
Clean 1D-1S-2H reverse then S 3C FSF; minor wrinkle is the 4N quant tail past 3N that buries the FSF point.
1H-1S-2D, S bids 3C fourth-suit GF, N clarifies to 3N; clean, FSF on clear display.
S 2H FSF uncovers the H fit; long RKCB tail to 6H is the wrinkle but FSF leads cleanly.
1C-1H-1S, S 2D fourth-suit GF, opener describes 3C/3H, lands 3N; canonical 1-level FSF.
1D-1H-1S, S 2C fourth-suit GF, 3C-3H-3N; clean canonical FSF reaching 3N.
1H-1S-2C, S 2D FSF, N 3N, S corrects to 4H showing the major fit; clean and instructive.
1C-1H-1S, S 2D fourth-suit GF, 3C-3H-3N; canonical 1-level FSF.
1D-1H-1S, S 2C FSF; sound but the 2D-2H-2N-3N step-by-step clarification wanders a little before 3N.
1D-1S-2C, S 2H FSF; E's X intervenes, N redescribes 3D-3S then 3N; clean FSF with a competitive wrinkle.
1H-1S-2D, S 3C fourth-suit GF, N 3N, S 4H showing the H fit; clean and on-message.
1D-1S-2C, S 2H FSF; N shows 2N stopper, S 3S, lands 3N; sound with minor step-clarification wrinkle.
1C-1S-2H reverse, S 3D fourth-suit GF, N 3N; clean FSF, the reverse context is the only wrinkle.
1C-1H-1S, S 2D fourth-suit GF, N 2H showing 3-card support, S raises to 4H; clean fit-finding FSF.
1C-1H-1S, S 2D fourth-suit GF, 3C-3H-3N; canonical 1-level FSF to 3N.
1D-1S-2C, S 2H FSF finds the S fit; long RKCB tail stops in 5S, burying the FSF point a bit.
1C-1S-2H reverse, S 3D FSF, N 3N, S jumps to 6H on the 18-HCP fit; slam jump is the wrinkle but FSF is clean.
S 2H FSF is clean but the 4N-5H-6H Blackwood drive reaches a 6H that fails on DD (down_both); slam push is debatable.
1D-1S-2C, S 2H FSF, 3H-3S-3N; clean canonical FSF reaching 3N.
1D-1S-2C, S 2H FSF, N 3H showing 3 spades, S 4S; clean fit-finding FSF to 4S.
Off-pattern: S responds 2D (2/1 GF), not a 1-level suit, so 2S is not canonical fourth-suit-forcing; 3N also fails on DD.
1D-1S-2C, S 2H FSF, 3H-3S-3N; clean canonical FSF to 3N.
S 2D FSF is clean but the 2N-4C-5C-6C drive reaches a 6C that fails on DD (down_both); the long minor-slam tail buries the FSF point.
Off-pattern: S responds 2D (2/1 GF), not a 1-level suit, so 3H is not canonical fourth-suit-forcing; plus a Blackwood tail to 5D.
S 2C FSF is fine but the runaway 2D-2H-2N-4C-4D-4N-5H-6C slam auction reaches a 6C that fails on DD and totally obscures the FSF point.
S 2D FSF is clean but the very long 3H-3S-4C-4N-5S-6H slam tail buries the FSF point; 6H makes so it is defensible, not a reject.
1D-1S-2C, S 2H FSF, E's X, N jumps to 3N; short, clean FSF with a competitive touch.
1D-1S-2C, S 2H FSF, 3H-3S-3N; clean canonical FSF reaching 3N.
1H-1S-2D, South's 3C is the 4th suit GF; North clarifies with 3N. Clean stopper-ask FSF into game.
1C-1H-1S, South's 2D is the 4th suit GF; 3C-3H uncovers the 5-3 H fit, lands 4H. Canonical.
1D-1H-1S, South's 2C is 4th-suit GF; some cue tail (3S/4C) before settling in 4H on the H fit.
FSF 2C clean, but 3H-4H-RKCB-6H runs to a slam that DD says fails (down both); failing-slam tail buries the FSF point.

1D-1S-2C, South's 2H is 4th-suit GF; 2N-3S-3N. Clean stopper-ask into 3N.
1H-1S-2C, South's 2D is 4th-suit GF; long RKCB tail stops in 5S off a keycard, burying the FSF point.
South responded 2D (a 2/1 GF), not at the 1-level; 2S is technically the 4th suit but it is not the canonical 1-level FSF setup.

1C-1H-1S, South's 2D is 4th-suit GF; 3C-3H-3N. Clean FSF into 3N.
1H-1S-2D, South's 3C is 4th-suit GF; North bids 3N. Crisp FSF into 3N.
1D-1S-2C, South's 2H is 4th-suit GF; 3D-4H-4S corrects into the S fit. Sound with a minor placement wrinkle.
1C-1S-2H, South's 3D is 4th-suit GF; 3N then pulled 4C-5C to the C fit. FSF clear but the auction wanders.
FSF 2D clean, but 2H-3H-RKCB-6H runs to a slam DD says fails (down both); failing-slam tail buries the FSF point.

1D-1H-1S, South's 2C is 4th-suit GF; 2D-3N. Clean canonical FSF into 3N (DD down is a play issue, not bidding).
1C-1H-1S, South's 2D is 4th-suit GF; 3C-3H-3N. Clean canonical FSF into 3N.

1D-1H-1S-2C 4th-suit GF; opener 2D then 3H reveals 3-card H support, partnership lands 4H. Clean.
